name: fn_add_numbers
description: Add two numbers together and return their sum.

name: fn_greet
description: Generate a greeting message for a person by name.

name: fn_reverse_string
description: Reverse a string and return the reversed result.

name: fn_get_square_root
description: Calculate the square root of a number.

name: fn_substitute_string_with_regex
description: Replace (or remove) all occurrences matching a regex pattern in a string.

name: fn_is_palindrome
description: Check if a string is a palindrome and return the result.

name: fn_power
description: Raise a number to a power, optionally returning absolute value.

name: fn_format_address
description: Format a postal address from its components into a readable string.
